name: USS Tennessee (BB 43)
events: 22 May 1943 Around 1245 T/22, USS Baldwin (T/Cdr. G. Knüpfer, USN) got underway from Port Townsend.
Around 1255 T/22, USS Tennessee (Capt. R.S. Haggart, USN) also got underway.
USS Tennessee was to proceed to the San Diego area escorted by USS Baldwin. (1)

28 May 1943 Around 1730 T/28 / 1800 T/28, USS Baldwin (T/Cdr. G. Knüpfer, USN) parted company with USS Tennessee (Capt. R.S. Haggart, USN) upon being relieved as escort by USS Mullany (T/Cdr. B.J. Mullaney, USN). (2)
